scope: v1 contract consumer readiness handoff node consumer boundary
summary: v237 verifies Node consumers may read readiness evidence but may not start or stop Java or mini-kv, write routing, read credentials, parse raw endpoints, open managed audit connections, deploy, or roll back.
guards: checklist, digest, and readiness handoff all deny nodeMayStartOrStopJavaOrMiniKv
readiness handoff denies startsJavaService and startsMiniKvService
readiness handoff denies write routing and active shard router
readiness handoff denies credential value read, raw endpoint parsing, managed audit connection, deployment, and rollback
handoff checks and blocked operations explicitly expose the Node no-start/no-stop rule
